I‚Äôm on a mission

‚ÄėCause when I call you

It‚Äôs gonna blow

GO

GO

Go get it, Imma go get it
Never gonna settle for second

no slow jams

go go dance

Toh bole re zamana kharabi ho gayi

Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

Maine maroda toh lagti malaai hai

Ho bindiya teri mehtaabi ho gayi

en-US.title: Balam Pichkari 8K Full Video | Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani | Pritam | Ranbir,Deepika |Non Stop Holi Song
en-US.description:
Presenting the 8K Full Video Holi Song "Balam Pichkari" from the film "Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani". Starring Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapur & Kalki Koechlin.

Credits:
Song: Balam Pichkari
Music: Pritam Chakraborty
Singer: Vishal Dadlani, Shalmali Kholgade
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Movie: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani (2013)
Director: Ayan Mukerji
Cast: Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapoor, Kalki Koechlin
Music Label: T-Series

Lyrics:
The Balam Pichkari tune that killed me
You said the world has become barren
My king, when your color touched me
The simple and simple girl has become drunk

Why are you having so much fun?
Tune: I mixed cannabis in the air

Why are you having so much fun?
Tune: I mixed cannabis in the air

Why are you getting double the intoxication? Yes,
I played a sweet tune with my eyes.

Yes, your muslin kurti has turned pink.

How did your playful gait become royal, then?

When my lover sprayed water on me, I killed him.
The simple, simple girl became a drunkard.
Yes, when I was wearing jeans, I slapped him.
The slut became my neighbor's sister-in-law (x2)

Your wrist is in my hands.
I mean, it feels like a mala.

This addiction to mala will be expensive.
It's your goodness to abstain.

Your bindi has become your beauty.
It has become immeasurable in the desires of my heart.

When my lover sprayed water on me, I killed him.
The simple, simple girl became a drunkard.
Yes, when I was wearing jeans, I slapped him.
The slut became my neighbor's sister-in-law. (x2)

Why are you cursing about 'no vacancy'?
When the room in your heart is empty.
(The room is empty...)

I know what you want.
You said your prayers.
Your intention is Qawwali.

O cruel one, you've become quick to reply.
You've become the key to every lock today, right?

The tune of "Balam Pichkari" killed me.
The simple, sari-clad girl became a drunkard.
Yes, the tune that struck me while I was wearing jeans,
Then I became the neighbor's sister-in-law (x2)

Yes, I said, the world has become barren.
Yes, I said, the world has become barren...

snippet.title: Subedaar - Official Trailer | Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh, Saurabh Shukla
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Subedaar Official Trailer 
Starring Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Saurabh Shukla, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh and Faisal Malik
Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages ‚Äď including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal ‚Äď The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video‚Äôs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures ‚Äď Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#subedaar #SubedaarOnPrime #anilkapoor #trailer #officialtrailer #movie #primevideoindia

snippet.title: VEK X @swar5729 - SWAR | Prod by Pozod
snippet.description:
Final stop. Final energy. Final chapter of a journey we‚Äôll never forget.
ClassX Rush Live Final EP

Vek ‚úĖÔłŹ Swar ‚ÄĒ two voices, one stage, one powerful moment.
This is not just a live session, this is the closing of a story built with passion, pressure, practice, and pure love for music.

From the first beat to the last note, this final episode carries everything we believe in  raw performance, real emotion, and real connection with the crowd.
No filters. No shortcuts. Just music, movement, and memories made on stage.

Thank you to everyone who supported the journey, watched every episode, shared the clips, and believed in what we are building.
This one is for the culture.
This one is for the grind.
This one is for the people who never stopped listening.

KEYS : santosh tamang

Shot by : ZAY & Acies ( Aurora production )

snippet.title: Navjot Ahuja - Khat (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Navjot Ahuja - Khat 
Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios
Composition, Lyrics, Vocals - Navjot Ahuja 
Drums - Samarth Verma 
Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek‚Āüdafe

Neele‚Āüphool‚Āülaau tere liye
Khat‚Āülikhu tere liye
Mai‚Āükhuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
T–Ķri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau ter–Ķ liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye‚Ä¶

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

snippet.title: Zaalima - Arijit Singh | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Valentine‚Äôs Special Love Song
snippet.description:
ūüĎČūüŹĽ SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood Chartbusters - https://bit.ly/3Y1MW0B

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De‚Ä¶
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De‚Ä¶

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

localized.title: Zaalima - Arijit Singh | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Valentine‚Äôs Special Love Song
localized.description:
ūüĎČūüŹĽ SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood Chartbusters - https://bit.ly/3Y1MW0B

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De‚Ä¶
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De‚Ä¶

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

snippet.description:
‚ÄúNachana‚ÄĚ is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. ūüíÉūüŹĹūüēļūüŹĹ
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over‚ÄĒwhen the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, ‚ÄúNachana‚ÄĚ brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody‚Äôs watching.

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Muskuraye | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
Back in December, we did a very intimate show ‚ÄĒ just a few people, a lot of emotion, and the music that means everything to us. We filmed the night, and this is me and the band performing Muskuraye live at GhaamChhaya Intimate.

We‚Äôll be sharing more moments from that evening soon. Until then, stream the album 'GhaamChhaya' on all major platforms.
And happy Valentine‚Äôs Day ;)

Keys / Vocals ‚ÄĒ Yabesh Thapa
Female BV ‚ÄĒ Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar ‚ÄĒ John Tamang
Drums ‚ÄĒ Stifler
Bass ‚ÄĒ Av Kc
Electric Guitar ‚ÄĒ Roshan Lama
Sarangi ‚ÄĒ Kiran Maharjan
Flute ‚ÄĒ Shrijan Maharjan
Audio Engineer ‚ÄĒ Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Master ‚ÄĒ Kobid Bazra

snippet.title: 100 Days as King of the Unstable SMP
snippet.description:
After becoming the first King of the Unstable SMP, I promised to protect my people and my kingdom... and if I don't? Then I'll resign. These are my First 100 Days as King of the Unstable SMP.  

Unstable SMP:
‚ěú ‚Ä™  ‚Ä™ @wemmbumc 
‚ěú ‚Ä™  ‚Ä™ @FlameFragsMC 
‚ěú ‚Ä™   @Spokeishere 
‚ěú ‚Ä™  ‚Ä™ @ParrotX2  

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @dragon_mc_ @lezywezy @4CVIT @LettuceK 

Original Song by @tsynphonia 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | QUARTER FINALS | Day 4
snippet.description:
The Quarter Finals of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens as qualified teams step into a stage where every match carries heavier consequences. Consistency, composure, and calculated aggression will define who moves forward.

From The Grind to Round 4, the journey has built up to this moment. Now the margin for error gets thinner.

Watch the Quarter Finals unfold and see who takes the next step toward the Finals.

#BGIS2026 #BreakingBoundaries #KraftonIndiaEsports #KIE #BGMI

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Bruno Mars - Risk It All

The Romantic ‚Äď the new album from Bruno Mars, available now. Listen now: https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic

Directed by Bruno Mars & Daniel Ramos

Lyrics: 
For just a chance to win your heart
you could set the bar
beyond the stars
I‚Äôll do anything anything you ask me to

Say you want the moon watch me learn to fly
Ain't a mountain you could point to i wouldn‚Äôt climb
It's crazy but it‚Äôs true. There‚Äôs nothing I won't do. 
I‚Äôd risk it all for you

To hold your hand and call you mine
I‚Äôm trynna be your man
til the end of time
oh i‚Äôll do anything, anything you ask me to

I would run through the fire just to be by your side
if your heart‚Äôs on the line you could take mine
It's crazy but it‚Äôs true. There's nothing I won‚Äôt do. 
I'd risk it all for you

I would swim across the sea just to show you
sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on to prove that you belong
here in my arms

Say you want the moon watch me, learn to fly
ain‚Äôt a mountain you could point to I wouldn‚Äôt climb

It's crazy but it‚Äôs true. There's nothing I won‚Äôt do
I‚Äôd risk it all for you (2x)

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY¬ģ-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for ‚ÄúDie with a Smile‚ÄĚ with Lady Gaga and ‚ÄúAPT.‚ÄĚ with ROS√Č, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010‚Äôs ‚ÄúJust the Way You Are‚ÄĚ). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY¬ģ Awards (including ‚ÄúAlbum of the Year‚ÄĚ for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

#BrunoMars #RiskItAll #OfficialMusicVideo

snippet.title: ROBLOX SLIDE FOR BRAINROTS..
snippet.description:
Today I had to slide down a hill for the rarest brainrots. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

What happens when the worlds of gaming, vlogging, and cartoons collide? In today‚Äôs action-packed episode of Indian Bikes Driving 3D, we are heading on a massive mission!
The Storyline:
We are traveling deep into the village to meet the legends themselves‚ÄĒSourav Joshi, Piyush Joshi, and Kunal! But we aren't going empty-handed. To make this meeting unforgettable, we‚Äôve secured a luxury Ferrari as a special gift!
The Squad:
It‚Äôs not just a solo trip! We‚Äôve got the ultimate gang traveling together by train:
Chacha (The muscle)
Doraemon (With his gadgets ready)
Shinchan (Bringing the mischief)
Watch us navigate the tracks, manage the heavy cargo on the train, and drive through the village roads to deliver this supercar to the Joshi family. Will we reach safely, or will there be chaos on the way?
Buckle up for the most legendary delivery in simulator history!

In the backseat of your Rover

From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

We ain't ever gettin' older

snippet.title: Djo - End Of Beginning (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
ūüŹīů†Āßů†ĀĘů†Ā•ů†Āģů†Āßů†ĀŅListen: Djo - End Of Beginning (Lyrics)

ūüŹīů†Āßů†ĀĘů†Ā•ů†Āģů†Āßů†ĀŅLyrics:

[Verse 1]
Just one more tear to cry, one teardrop from my eye
You better save it for
The middle of the night when things aren't black and white
Enter, Troubadour
"Remember twenty-four?"

[Chorus]
And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it
Another version of me, I was in it
I wave goodbye to the end of beginning

[Verse 2]
This song has started now, and you're just finding out
Now isn't that a laugh?
A major sacrifice, but clueless at the time
Enter, Caroline
"Just trust me, you'll be fine"

[Chorus]
And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it
Another version of me, I was in it
I wave goodbye to the end of beginning
(Goodbye, goodbye, goodbye, goodbye)

[Bridge]
You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man
You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man
You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man
You take the man out of the

[Chorus]
And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it
Another version of me, I was in it
Oh, I wave goodbye to the end of beginning
(Goodbye, goodbye)

snippet.title: Easily 3 Star Dragon Escape Challenges 1-4 (Clash of Clans)
snippet.description:
How to 3 Star Levels 1 to 4 of the Hero Campaign: Dragon Escape Challenges in Clash of Clans. Judo Sloth provides a tutorial for the new event attacks which celebrate the launch of the Dragon Duke Hero. The March Season is Dragon Themed for the Dragon Duke and comes with numerous events, including Free Equipment or Starry Ore on the Supercell Store. Thank you for using code judo to support the channel. Best of luck with your 3 stars!

Free Equipment or Starry Ore on Supercell Store: https://store.supercell.com/en?boost=judo 

Suggested Videos: 
Dragon Duke Explained - New Hero: https://youtu.be/SyHlEE8woTE
1 vs 10 Clan War to Double My Ore: https://youtu.be/aoidq7EOMXE

Thank you for using Code 'Judo' in Clash of Clans to support me.
Supercell Store: https://store.supercell.com/en?boost=judo 
In Clash of Clans: https://bit.ly/CodeJudo

I'm part of Supercell's Creators Program; find more information here: https://creators.supercell.com/en/supercell-partner

This video features 100% original Grand Theft Auto V gameplay recorded and played by me in real time. All gameplay footage is captured directly from my own system and is not reused, copied, or taken from any other creator or source.
In this video, you will see authentic GTA 5 gameplay with natural progression, original playstyle, and proper in-game actions. Every scene, movement, and mission is performed by me during live gameplay recording. No third-party clips, movies, trailers, or reused content are included.
This content is created purely for gaming and entertainment purposes. The gameplay includes my own effort, recording, and basic editing to ensure originality and quality. Each video on this channel is uniquely recorded to provide viewers with a real and genuine GTA 5 experience.
Game Information
Game Name: Grand Theft Auto V
Platform: PC
Mode: Story Mode / Free Roam
Recording Type: Self Recorded Gameplay
If you enjoy original GTA 5 gameplay videos, feel free to support the channel by watching, liking, and subscribing for more upcoming content.
Thank you for watching.

snippet.title: [NP] PUBG MOBILE CAMPUS CLUB NEPAL 2026 ‚Äď GRAND FINALS DAY 2
snippet.description:
Namaste Nepal! Witness the rise of the next generation of Nepali esports talent! Today marks the start of the PUBG MOBILE Campus Club Nepal 2026 Grand Finals.

Supported by Ncell, eSewa, and AECC, this tournament has brought together student gamers from 64 campuses across 5 cities. Today, the Top 16 teams face off in high-stakes matches to claim their share of the NPR 350,000 prize pool and qualify for the PMNC Nepal 2026 Round of 64.

Today's Schedule:

Match 1: Rondo
Match 2: Erangel
Match 3: Erangel
Match 4: Erangel
Match 5: Miramar
Match 6: Miramar

Don't miss a second of the action. Drop a comment for your favorite college team! ūüĎá

#PMCC2026 #PUBGMNP #PUBGMobileCampusClub #CampusToConqueror

Lyrics:
Sun, sun re piya
Ghum hai kahan, kahan tu?
Khaarijh ye dil
Tune kiya, kiya kyu?
Khabar nahi teri na aasraa
Guroor hai tera ya hai khataa meri
Mujhe bata de zara

Mere falak ke noor nazaare bhi
Tere kadmon ke dhool se parey nahi
Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa
Sun saawariya

Sun saawariya kahan tu?
Teri reet main samajh na paau
Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoomta hi rahu

(Hmm)
(Aaa)

Taare, sitaare saare
Maange hai tera pataa
Aur aadhe, adhoore vaade
Leke chal diye ho kahan?

Mere falak ke noor nazaare bhi
Tere kadmon ke dhool se parey nahi
Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa
(Hmm)

Sun saawariya kahan tu?
Teri reet main samajh na paau
Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoom

Sun saawariya

Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoomta hi rahu

Het grootste weggeefevenement van het jaar! Gyan Gaming en Raistar hebben de geweldige community iets teruggegeven met een enorme weggeefactie van maar liefst 20 lakh (2 miljoen) per stuk voor gelukkige abonnees! ūüėĪūüíł

Waarom? Omdat het officieel de Gouden Maand van MOBA 5v5 is, en de festiviteiten zijn ongekend!

ūüéģ Speel en win enorme prijzen!

De beloningen houden niet op bij de geldprijs. Om de Gouden Maand te vieren, is er momenteel een waanzinnig in-game evenement gaande:

Er worden 10.000 smartphones weggegeven, rechtstreeks in de MOBA-game! ūüďĪūüĒ•

ūüď≤ Download MOBA 5v5 nu:
Mis je kans niet om groots te winnen. Ga naar de Play Store, download MOBA 5v5 en duik vandaag nog in de actie!

ūüĎČ https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mobiin.gp&pcampaignid=web_share

Bekijk de volledige video om te zien hoe je je beloningen van Gyan Gaming en Raistar kunt claimen.

ūüĎć Vergeet niet te LIKEN, ABONNEREN en op het BELLETJE te klikken, zodat je nooit een update mist! Laat ons in de reacties weten wat je zou doen als je wint!

ŗį¨ŗįĻŗĪĀŗįģŗį§ŗĪĀŗį≤ŗĪĀ ŗį®ŗįóŗį¶ŗĪĀ ŗį¨ŗįĻŗĪĀŗįģŗį§ŗįŅŗį§ŗĪč ŗįÜŗįóŗįĶŗĪĀ. ŗįóŗĪčŗį≤ŗĪćŗį°ŗĪÜŗį®ŗĪć ŗįģŗįāŗį§ŗĪć‚ÄĆŗį®ŗĪĀ ŗįúŗįįŗĪĀŗį™ŗĪĀŗįēŗĪčŗįĶŗį°ŗįĺŗį®ŗįŅŗįēŗįŅ, ŗį™ŗĪćŗįįŗįłŗĪćŗį§ŗĪĀŗį§ŗįā ŗįóŗĪáŗįģŗĪć‚ÄĆŗį≤ŗĪč ŗįíŗįē ŗį™ŗįŅŗįöŗĪćŗįöŗįŅ ŗįąŗįĶŗĪÜŗįāŗįüŗĪć ŗįúŗįįŗĪĀŗįóŗĪĀŗį§ŗĪčŗįāŗį¶ŗįŅ:

10,000 ŗįłŗĪćŗįģŗįĺŗįįŗĪćŗįüŗĪć‚ÄĆŗįęŗĪčŗį®ŗĪć‚ÄĆŗį≤ŗĪĀ MOBA ŗįóŗĪáŗįģŗĪć ŗį≤ŗĪčŗį™ŗį≤ ŗį®ŗĪáŗįįŗĪĀŗįóŗįĺ ŗįáŗįĶŗĪćŗįĶŗį¨ŗį°ŗĪĀŗį§ŗĪĀŗį®ŗĪćŗį®ŗįĺŗįĮŗįŅ! ūüďĪūüĒ•

ūüď≤ MOBA 5v5ŗį®ŗįŅ ŗįáŗį™ŗĪćŗį™ŗĪĀŗį°ŗĪá ŗį°ŗĪĆŗį®ŗĪć‚ÄĆŗį≤ŗĪčŗį°ŗĪć ŗįöŗĪáŗįłŗĪĀŗįēŗĪčŗįāŗį°ŗįŅ:
ŗį™ŗĪÜŗį¶ŗĪćŗį¶ŗįóŗįĺ ŗįóŗĪÜŗį≤ŗįŅŗįöŗĪá ŗįÖŗįĶŗįēŗįĺŗį∂ŗįĺŗį®ŗĪćŗį®ŗįŅ ŗįēŗĪčŗį≤ŗĪćŗį™ŗĪčŗįēŗįāŗį°ŗįŅ. ŗį™ŗĪćŗį≤ŗĪá ŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗĪčŗįįŗĪć‚ÄĆŗįēŗįŅ ŗįĶŗĪÜŗį≥ŗĪćŗį≤ŗįāŗį°ŗįŅ, MOBA 5v5ŗį®ŗįŅ ŗį°ŗĪĆŗį®ŗĪć‚ÄĆŗį≤ŗĪčŗį°ŗĪć ŗįöŗĪáŗįłŗĪĀŗįēŗĪčŗįāŗį°ŗįŅ ŗįģŗįįŗįŅŗįĮŗĪĀ ŗįąŗįįŗĪčŗįúŗĪá ŗįöŗįįŗĪćŗįĮŗį≤ŗĪčŗįēŗįŅ ŗį¶ŗĪāŗįēŗįāŗį°ŗįŅ!

ŗįúŗĪćŗįěŗįĺŗį®ŗĪć ŗįóŗĪáŗįģŗįŅŗįāŗįóŗĪć ŗįģŗįįŗįŅŗįĮŗĪĀ ŗįįŗĪąŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗįĺŗįįŗĪć ŗį®ŗĪĀŗįāŗį°ŗįŅ ŗįģŗĪÄ ŗįįŗįŅŗįĶŗįĺŗįįŗĪćŗį°ŗĪć‚ÄĆŗį≤ŗį®ŗĪĀ ŗįéŗį≤ŗįĺ ŗįēŗĪćŗį≤ŗĪÜŗįĮŗįŅŗįģŗĪć ŗįöŗĪáŗįłŗĪĀŗįēŗĪčŗįĶŗįĺŗį≤ŗĪč ŗį§ŗĪÜŗį≤ŗĪĀŗįłŗĪĀŗįēŗĪčŗįĶŗį°ŗįĺŗį®ŗįŅŗįēŗįŅ ŗį™ŗĪāŗįįŗĪćŗį§ŗįŅ ŗįĶŗĪÄŗį°ŗįŅŗįĮŗĪčŗį®ŗĪĀ ŗį§ŗį™ŗĪćŗį™ŗįēŗĪĀŗįāŗį°ŗįĺ ŗįöŗĪāŗį°ŗįāŗį°ŗįŅ.

ml.description:
ūüö® ŗīĶŗīģŗĶćŗī™ŗĶĽ ŗīēŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗī∑ŗĶć ŗīóŗīŅŗīĶŗĶć ŗīÖŗīĶŗĶá! ŗīóŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗĶĽ ŗīóŗĶÜŗīĮŗīŅŗīģŗīŅŗīāŗīóŗĶĀŗīā ŗīĪŗĶąŗīłŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīĺŗĶľ ŗīłŗĶľŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗĶąŗīłŗĶć ŗīłŗī¨ŗĶć‚ÄĆŗīłŗĶć‚ÄĆŗīēŗĶćŗīįŗĶąŗī¨ŗĶáŗīīŗĶć‚ÄĆŗīłŗĶĀŗīā! ūüéĀ
ŗīą ŗīĶŗĶľŗī∑ŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶÜ ŗīŹŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīĶŗĶĀŗīā ŗīĶŗī≤ŗīŅŗīĮ ŗīóŗīŅŗīĶŗĶć ŗīÖŗīĶŗĶá ŗīáŗīĶŗī®ŗĶćŗīĪŗĶć! ŗī≠ŗīĺŗīóŗĶćŗīĮŗī∂ŗīĺŗī≤ŗīŅŗīēŗī≥ŗīĺŗīĮ ŗīłŗī¨ŗĶć‚ÄĆŗīłŗĶć‚ÄĆŗīēŗĶćŗīįŗĶąŗī¨ŗĶáŗīīŗĶć‚ÄĆŗīłŗīŅŗī®ŗĶć 20 ŗī≤ŗīēŗĶćŗī∑ŗīā ŗīįŗĶāŗī™ŗīĮŗĶĀŗīüŗĶÜ ŗīĶŗīģŗĶćŗī™ŗĶĽ ŗīłŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīĺŗī®ŗīā ŗī®ŗĶĹŗīēŗīŅ ŗīóŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗĶĽ ŗīóŗĶÜŗīĮŗīŅŗīģŗīŅŗīāŗīóŗĶĀŗīā ŗīĪŗĶąŗīłŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīĺŗīĪŗĶĀŗīā ŗīÖŗī§ŗĶćŗī≠ŗĶĀŗī§ŗīēŗīįŗīģŗīĺŗīĮ ŗīłŗīģŗĶāŗīĻŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶć ŗī§ŗīŅŗīįŗīŅŗīöŗĶćŗīöŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶĹŗīēŗīŅ! ūüėĪūüíł

ŗīéŗī®ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶĀŗīēŗĶäŗī£ŗĶćŗīüŗīĺŗī£ŗĶć ŗīáŗī§ŗĶć ŗīłŗīāŗī≠ŗīĶŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗĶć? ŗīēŗīĺŗīįŗī£ŗīā ŗīáŗī§ŗĶć ŗīĒŗī¶ŗĶćŗīĮŗĶčŗīóŗīŅŗīēŗīģŗīĺŗīĮŗīŅ MOBA 5v5 ŗīóŗĶčŗĶĺŗī°ŗĶĽ ŗīģŗīĺŗīłŗīģŗīĺŗī£ŗĶć, ŗīÜŗīėŗĶčŗī∑ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ ŗīöŗīĺŗĶľŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗĶĀŗīēŗī≥ŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗī®ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶć ŗī™ŗĶĀŗīĪŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīĺŗī£ŗĶć!

snippet.title: New Community Event: Unleash the Duke
snippet.description:
Dragon Duke needs to be freed, and he‚Äôs counting on all of you.

Starting tomorrow, jump into the Unleash the Duke Community Event, available in-game.

Navigate the dungeon, complete objectives, and choose one of the three new doors every day - each hiding different rewards. Push all the way to the final door, and everyone will unlock the Dragon Statue.

Free the Duke!
_______

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ‚Ėļ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ‚Ėļ https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ‚Ėļ https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 
TikTok ‚Ėļ https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit https://help.supercellsupport.com/clash-of-clans/en/

Privacy Policy:
https://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
https://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent‚Äôs Guide:
https://supercell.com/en/parents/

#clashofclans
